2026-05-26LGCFederal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board ActAppointment of a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment BoardAppointment of Lisa Woodstock of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective July 2, 2026.N/A
act: Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board Act
subject: Appointment of a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board
precis: Appointment of Lisa Woodstock of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective July 2, 2026.
